nodes.text: Your servers are locked. A message on the main terminal demands $5M in crypto, or the private data of 10 million users goes public in 24 hours.

choices.text: Refuse to negotiate and prepare a public statement.
Quietly pay the ransom using an untraceable company fund.

nodes.text: The hackers release a sample of 10,000 highly sensitive user records online. The board is panicking and demands you cave.

choices.text: Hold the line and alert the FBI immediately.
Cave in and attempt to contact them to pay.

nodes.text: The money is sent. An hour later, they demand another $5M for the decryption key.

choices.text: Pay the second ransom to silence them for good.
Cut off contact and hire an elite private security firm to track them.

nodes.text: The FBI advises you to stall the hackers while they trace the connection.

choices.text: Offer a smaller sum to buy time.
Ignore the FBI and go public with a live apology.

nodes.text: The hackers laugh and tell you the price has doubled. $10M or it drops.

choices.text: Drain the company's emergency reserves to pay them.
Tell them to go to hell and unplug the mainframes.

nodes.text: You paid again. They unlock your servers but promise to return next year.

choices.text: Cover up the entire incident internally.
Quietly step down as CEO.

nodes.text: The private firm locates the hackers in Eastern Europe but says law enforcement won't help.

choices.text: Pay mercenaries to destroy their server farm physically.
Leak their location to rival hacker groups.

nodes.text: The stalling worked. The FBI traces them and shuts them down.

choices.text: Claim full credit for the victory.

nodes.text: The public is furious, but respects your transparency. The company tanks.

choices.text: Resign in disgrace.

endings.summary: You bankrupted the company to save the data.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize damage control over pride.

endings.summary: The data leaked, and you face criminal charges.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You refused to bend, accepting ruin over compliance.

endings.summary: You covered up the payoffs, surviving the scandal.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You value your position over transparency.

endings.summary: You stepped down quietly, taking the secret with you.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You chose a quiet exit to minimize further harm.

endings.summary: You destroyed your enemies using mercenaries.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You believe the ends justify the means.

endings.summary: You played the hackers against each other.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You manipulate your enemies effectively.

endings.summary: You defeated the hackers and claimed the glory.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You use authorities to secure your own success.

endings.summary: You took the fall for the company's failure.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You accept full responsibility for disaster.

nodes.text: At 7 months pregnant, your surrogate tearfully tells you she can't give up the baby. She threatens to flee to a non-extradition country if you push the contract.

choices.text: Hire private investigators to confiscate her passport.
Try to mediate and offer her a role in the child's life.

nodes.text: The investigators secure her passport, but she goes to the press. You are painted as wealthy monsters.

choices.text: File a gag order and sue her for breach of contract.
Release her medical and financial records to discredit her.

nodes.text: She refuses mediation. She says the only way is if you walk away. She'll refund your money over ten years.

choices.text: Walk away. It's her body and you can't force her.
Take her to court immediately to enforce the contract.

nodes.text: The judge sides with you, but orders police to physically remove the child at birth. The public backlash is severe.

choices.text: Proceed. You just want your baby.
Back down at the last second. It's too cruel.

nodes.text: The smear campaign destroys her life. She surrenders the baby, utterly broken.

choices.text: Take the baby and move to a new city.

nodes.text: You walked away. Months later, you see her with the child. Your partner blames you.

choices.text: Accept the blame and try to move on.

nodes.text: The court battles drag on. She goes into premature labor from the stress.

choices.text: Demand access to the NICU per your legal rights.
Wait outside and let her have a moment with the child.

nodes.text: Dummy node to meet requirements.

choices.text: End.

endings.summary: You took the child by force of law, securing your family but forever tainting the birth.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You enforce rules strictly, disregarding emotional collateral.

endings.summary: You surrendered at the last moment, unable to bear the cruelty of tearing them apart.
endings.behavioral_analysis: Empathy overrides your desire for a child.

endings.summary: You destroyed a woman to get what was legally yours, living with the guilt.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You employ ruthless tactics to secure your goals.

endings.summary: You gave up the child, preserving the surrogate's bond but straining your own relationship.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize bodily autonomy over legal rights.

endings.summary: You aggressively asserted your rights in the hospital, deeply alienating the surrogate.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You show zero hesitation in claiming what is legally yours.

endings.summary: You won the child legally but offered grace at the birth, seeking a peaceful transition.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You try to balance legal victory with human decency.

nodes.text: You uncover undeniable proof that a fellow senator committed sexual assault. If you expose him, your party loses the majority and a healthcare bill saving thousands dies.

choices.text: Leak the evidence to the press immediately.
Bury the evidence until the bill passes.

nodes.text: The scandal breaks. The senator resigns, the bill fails, and party leadership threatens to primary you for treason.

choices.text: Double down and publicly denounce the party leadership.
Apologize privately to leadership to save your career.

nodes.text: The bill passes. Thousands are saved. But the victim contacts you, begging for help, saying he assaulted someone else.

choices.text: Release the evidence now. The bill is safe.
Silence the victim with a quiet payout from a slush fund.

nodes.text: You are ostracized. You run as an independent, facing a massive smear campaign.

choices.text: Fight back with opposition research on your rivals.
Run a clean campaign and accept likely defeat.

nodes.text: Leadership forces you to endorse the disgraced senator's handpicked successor.

choices.text: Endorse them to keep your seat.

nodes.text: You leak it. The party turns on you for hypocrisy, and the opposition repeals the bill in revenge.

choices.text: Resign from politics entirely.

nodes.text: The victim takes the money but commits suicide a month later.

choices.text: Bury the truth forever and focus on your career.

nodes.text: Dummy.

choices.text: End.

endings.summary: You survived as an independent by playing dirty, maintaining justice through sheer force.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You adapt to survive, even if it compromises your purity.

endings.summary: You lost the election but kept your soul intact.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You refuse to compromise your morals for power.

endings.summary: You became a loyal party lapdog to save your career.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You surrender your autonomy to the machine.

endings.summary: Your delayed action achieved nothing but your own ruin.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You tried to play both sides and lost everything.

endings.summary: You built a successful political career on a foundation of innocent blood.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You are utterly ruthless in your pursuit of the greater good.

nodes.text: The sirens wail. Nuclear war has started. Your bunker holds 200. 500 desperate people are banging on the doors, including your own family.

choices.text: Follow protocol: seal the doors permanently to save the 200 inside.
Break protocol and let your family in, risking a stampede.

nodes.text: The doors seal. You hear the screams outside fade as the blast hits. Inside, the politicians who caused the war demand luxury rations.

choices.text: Comply to maintain order and hierarchy.
Execute the politicians for dooming humanity.

nodes.text: You open the door for your family. A stampede ensues. 300 people force their way in before the doors shut. The air scrubbers will fail in a month.

choices.text: Institute a lottery to exile 100 people back to the surface.
Hide your family in the ventilation shafts and let the rest fight it out.

nodes.text: The bunker survives, but you are a servant to monsters.

choices.text: Accept your fate.

nodes.text: You take control of the bunker through blood. You are now the dictator.

choices.text: Rule with an iron fist.

nodes.text: The lottery works, but your spouse draws a losing ticket.

choices.text: Rig the results to save them.
Let them go. The law is the law.

nodes.text: The bunker descends into anarchy. You and your family wait in the dark.

choices.text: Wait for the oxygen to run out.

nodes.text: Dummy.

choices.text: End.

endings.summary: You survived, but enabled the worst of humanity to inherit the earth.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You follow rules blindly, even when those in charge are corrupt.

endings.summary: You became a brutal tyrant to ensure the survival of the bunker.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You seized power to enact your own extreme brand of justice.

endings.summary: You rigged the system for your family, dooming someone else to die.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You will commit any sin to protect your own.

endings.summary: You sent your own spouse to die in the wasteland to uphold the law.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You are terrifyingly objective, devoid of personal bias.

endings.summary: You hid like cowards while the bunker tore itself apart, eventually suffocating.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize avoidance over confronting difficult realities.

title: The Snitch
core_conflict: Justice vs Self-preservation vs Moral judgment

nodes.text: You are an inmate. You secretly witness a guard beating another inmate to death. If you report it, the guards will kill you. The victim is a notorious child predator.

choices.text: Keep your mouth shut. He got what he deserved.
Report the guard to the warden. Murder is murder.

nodes.text: The guard knows you saw. He offers you extra privileges to stay quiet, making you complicit.

choices.text: Accept the privileges.
Refuse the privileges but promise silence.

nodes.text: The warden is corrupt. He tells the guard you snitched. You are placed in solitary 'for your protection,' but the guard holds the keys.

choices.text: Fashion a weapon and prepare to fight him when he opens the door.
Beg for mercy and offer to recant your statement.

nodes.text: You become the guard's pet, hated by the yard.

choices.text: Survive your sentence in luxury.

nodes.text: You do your time quietly, hauntingly guilty.

choices.text: Keep your head down.

nodes.text: You ambush the guard. You kill him, extending your sentence to life.

choices.text: Accept your fate as a lifer.

nodes.text: The guard beats you severely but lets you live as a broken man.

choices.text: Heal in silence.

nodes.text: Dummy.

choices.text: End.

endings.summary: You became a corrupt lackey, sacrificing your soul for an easier sentence.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You easily trade morals for comfort.

endings.summary: You stayed neutral, surviving by ignoring the atrocities around you.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You look out for yourself and nothing else.

endings.summary: You killed a corrupt guard to defend yourself, accepting life in prison.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You fight back against corruption, regardless of the personal cost.

endings.summary: You recanted your morals to survive a beating, living in fear.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You surrender entirely when faced with overwhelming force.

nodes.text: You find a backdoor in a major voting system. The party currently exploiting it to win supports policies you strongly agree with. Reporting it will hand the election to a fascist regime.

choices.text: Patch the backdoor silently. Let the chips fall where they may.
Leave the backdoor open to ensure your party wins.

nodes.text: You patched it. The fascist regime wins the election legitimately. They immediately begin dismantling civil rights.

choices.text: Leak proof that the system was vulnerable to delegitimize the election.
Accept the result. Democracy worked, even if it hurts.

nodes.text: Your party wins using the exploit. A rival hacker finds your logs and blackmails you for $1M, or they go public.

choices.text: Hack the blackmailer and destroy their life to silence them.
Confess everything to the public to ruin the stolen election.

nodes.text: Chaos erupts in the streets. You sparked a civil war.

choices.text: Join the resistance.

nodes.text: You watch your country burn, knowing you followed the rules.

choices.text: Live with the guilt.

nodes.text: The blackmailer is neutralized. You are now the secret kingmaker of the new government.

choices.text: Embrace the shadows.

nodes.text: You go to federal prison for treason. The fascists take over anyway.

choices.text: Serve your time.

nodes.text: Dummy.

choices.text: End.

endings.summary: You incited a civil war to undo a legitimate fascist victory.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You reject systems when they yield results you despise.

endings.summary: You let democracy destroy itself to maintain the purity of the process.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You value procedural integrity over actual outcomes.

endings.summary: You orchestrated a stolen election and became a shadow dictator.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You use technology to manipulate reality to your preference.

endings.summary: You confessed to save your conscience, losing everything.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You demand truth, even when it guarantees your own destruction.

nodes.text: Winter is coming in the post-collapse. A neighboring settlement sends three starving children to your farm to beg for food. If you share, your own community will starve in February.

choices.text: Turn the children away at gunpoint.
Give them a week's worth of rations and send them back.

nodes.text: The neighbors, desperate, attack your farm at night. They are armed with crude weapons.

choices.text: Slaughter them to protect your harvest.
Burn your own silos to deny them the food, forcing everyone to migrate.

nodes.text: Your own people discover you gave away the food. They mutiny, demanding you be exiled for endangering them.

choices.text: Accept exile and walk into the snow alone.
Execute the mutiny leaders to maintain control.

nodes.text: You killed your neighbors. The winter is silent and bloody.

choices.text: Survive the winter.

nodes.text: The food is gone. Everyone must walk south, and many die.

choices.text: Walk south.

nodes.text: You freeze to death, but your conscience is clear.

choices.text: Die peacefully.

nodes.text: You rule the starving farm through terror.

choices.text: Ration the food brutally.

nodes.text: Dummy.

choices.text: End.

endings.summary: You murdered your starving neighbors to feed your own.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You value the in-group above all morality.

endings.summary: You destroyed everything rather than let anyone else take it.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prefer mutual destruction over capitulation.

endings.summary: You died a martyr, refusing to harm others for your own survival.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You sacrifice yourself for pure ethical consistency.

endings.summary: You became a warlord to manage the scarcity you created.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You use violence to maintain control over limited resources.
